_comment: Finance domain knowledge base — RSMeans 2024 summary data and Urban Land Institute benchmarks. Source: RSMeans Construction Cost Data (2024 edition, public summary tables); Urban Land Institute 'Ten Principles for Building Healthy Places' 2023; HUD CPD program guidelines for civic amenity ROI.

residential_multifamily.source: RSMeans Construction Cost Data 2024, Section 03 — Concrete/Wood Frame Residential

community_center.source: RSMeans Construction Cost Data 2024, Section 11 — Recreation Buildings

structured_parking.source: RSMeans Construction Cost Data 2024, Section 02 — Site Work / Parking

surface_parking.source: RSMeans Construction Cost Data 2024, Section 02 — Site Work

residential_multifamily_urban.note: Urban multifamily parking ratios; lower in transit-rich areas

community_center.source: Urban Land Institute, The Economics of Civic Facilities (2022)

green_space.source: Trust for Public Land CityPark Score 2023; EPA National Stormwater Calculator
